description: 7-point rubric scoring layer for LOOP engineering. Orthogonal to judgment.policy.json (risk gating). Decides rework/iterate vs wait_human based on failure_class.
scoring_principles: Judge is decoupled: different model/temperature, never loads executor chain-of-thought
Every score MUST include strengths, defects, and fix_suggestion; bare scores are rejected
Hard disqualifier hit caps score at 4 (fail) regardless of other rubric items
missing_context MUST be distinguished from correctable_replan; misrouting causes infinite rework loops
Final delivery uses multi-sample voting; stage gates use single deterministic sample
Score 5 label is 'fail_with_minor_defects' (not 'pass_with_minor_defects'): threshold=6 means 5 is a FAIL. Label must be honest about pass/fail status.

Stage-differentiated thresholds: context=4 (lenient, false-reject wastes pipeline), decide/act=5 (medium, iteration cheap), evaluate=6 (strict, delivery cost highest). Ref: SWE-bench Verified difficulty stratification + verification-loop phase-specific strictness.
First-layer QA (execution) should be effective but not over-invested: score=5 with minor defects is acceptable for stage progression.
Second-layer QA (product taste) uses PM-as-QA: value_validation weight ensures product value, not just functional correctness.
Third-layer QA (product survival) is human-gated and cross-task: it triggers on iteration proposals and release events, not per-run.
Secretary is the QA coordinator: collects multi-role scores at evaluate, identifies cross-role inconsistencies, provides QA basis to controller.

missing_context.human_prompt_hint: Score is low because required context is missing. Stop iteration. Ask human to supply the missing fields. Do NOT auto-rework.

human_judgment_required.human_prompt_hint: Score is low and requires human judgment the agent cannot self-resolve.

policy_blocked.human_prompt_hint: Action blocked by policy; human must authorize or adjust scope.

maker_checker_isolation.rule: maker and checker must have different agent_id; evaluate-stage checker must come from a different model family (open-weight / closed-weight / some-theory) when feasible; act-stage self-check is early-return only, not a pass basis
maker_checker_isolation.fallback: if only one model family available in registry, degrade to temperature=0 same-model check (statistical safety, not core safety)
maker_checker_isolation.ref: Huang et al. 2024 LLMs Cannot Self-Correct Yet + Constitutional AI (Anthropic 2022)

minimum_sample_size.rule: third-layer QA directional adjustments (change north_star, change product positioning, cut features) require min sample = max(3 runs, 1 full iteration cycle); below threshold, slow-loop QA records but does not adjust

rubric_items.description: PM-as-QA: does the outcome create genuine product value, not just meet functional acceptance criteria? Based on context advantage (taste).

Anti AI-Slop check: UI output must not trigger any slop fingerprint listed in taste-skill (purple-blue gradient hero, dark grid background, elliptical buttons, centered stacked cards). vibe-designer invokes taste-skill at act->evaluate boundary.
Each retry carries new observation or modified assumption; no empty-loop iterations. Progress delta >= 0.02 per cycle.
Handoff envelopes are semantically complete: receiver has all required fields, artifacts reachable, acknowledgment closed.
Comprehension Debt defense: in human_gated stage, human must read diff and write a >=30 char comprehension summary before approve; reject does not require summary. Prevents rubber-stamp approval.

output_schema.human_prompt_hint: string (non-empty when verdict starts with needs_human_)

judge_agent.scorer_role: secretary evaluates against user-confirmed intent and goals

qa_framework.principle: QA covers three layers: execution self-test (fast), product taste (medium), product survival (slow). Secretary is the taste guardian ensuring context advantage flows to every decision node.
context_advantage_layers: skill_required_context: each SKILL.md declares required_context; secretary verifies before dispatch
project_memory_injection: project_memory.md accumulates cross-task product knowledge; injected into context stage at run start
soul_boundary_enforcement: each SOUL.md defines role context boundary; handoff only passes in-boundary fields
